characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, fair complexion. He has short, dark hair parted slightly off-center. His facial features are clean-cut with dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: A plain, light grey short-sleeved t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Serious but earnest, attempting to convey personal struggle and subsequent success.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Sach bataun, office mein poor English ne mera confidence bilkul tod diya tha. [Honestly, poor English at the office had completely broken my confidence.]
Character A says: Har meeting mein mujhe pata hota tha kya bolna hai, par words hi nahi nikalte the... jab tak mujhe ek sahi solution nahi mila. [In every meeting I knew what to say, but the words just wouldn't come out... until I found the right solution.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook & Problem setup
- Establishes the highly relatable pain point of freezing up in professional settings due to lack of English fluency
- Builds empathy and sets up the transition to the solution
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
How I built my English confidence at work
Sach bataun
office mein poor English ne
mera confidence tod diya tha
Har meeting mein
mujhe pata hota tha kya bolna hai
par words hi nahi nikalte the
jab tak mujhe ek sahi solution nahi mila

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Ab phone par scroll karne ke bajaye, main din ke bas 10 minute Supernova app par bitata hoon. [Now, instead of scrolling on my phone, I spend just 10 minutes a day on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: Yeh app real-life situations mein English bolna sikhata hai, jaise office meetings ya doston se baat karna. [This app teaches you to speak English in real-life situations, like office meetings or talking to friends.]
Character A says: Yahan kuch ratna nahi padta. [You don't have to memorize anything here.]
Character A says: Aap AI tutor ke saath bolne ki practice karte hain, jab tak natural na lagne lage. [You practice speaking with an AI tutor until it starts feeling natural.]
Character A says: Sach mein, isne sab badal diya. [Honestly, it changed everything.]
Character A says: Ab main confidently English bolta hoon, aur log sach mein meri baat sunte hain. [Now I speak English confidently, and people actually listen to me.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Solution & Feature highlight
- Introduces Supernova as a practical, daily habit replacing mindless scrolling
- Emphasizes active speaking practice with an AI tutor over rote memorization
- Delivers the emotional payoff: gaining respect and being heard at work
